title: Containers now support Docker Hub images
raw_changelog: Containers now support Docker Hub images directly in Wrangler configuration.
before_text:
## Containers Configuration

Containers require images from Cloudflare Registry.

```toml
[[containers]]
image = "registry.cloudflare.com/my-account/my-image:latest"
```
after_text:
## Containers Configuration

Containers support images from Cloudflare Registry or Docker Hub.

```toml
[[containers]]
image = "registry.cloudflare.com/my-account/my-image:latest"
# OR
image = "docker.io/library/nginx:latest"
```

Private Docker Hub images are also supported. See documentation for credential configuration.
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -1,5 +1,9 @@
 ## Containers Configuration
 
-Containers require images from Cloudflare Registry.
+Containers support images from Cloudflare Registry or Docker Hub.
 
 [[containers]]
 image = "registry.cloudflare.com/my-account/my-image:latest"
+# OR
+image = "docker.io/library/nginx:latest"
+
+Private Docker Hub images are also supported.

ground_truth.action_required: No action required. Docker Hub images now available as alternative to Cloudflare Registry.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Additive feature, expands image source options
